summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.semantic; import java.io.File; import java.io.IOException; import java.nio.file.Files; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class AIContextTool { public static final String METADATA_SUFFIX = ".ai.json"; public EvoMetadata loadMetadata(File artifact) { File sidecar = getSidecarFile(artifact); if (sidecar.exists()) { try { String content = new String(Files.readAllBytes(sidecar.toPath())); EvoMetadata meta = parseSimpleJson(content, artifact.getPath()); if (sidecar.lastModified() < artifact.lastModified()) { meta.setStale(true); } return meta; } catch (IOException e) { }
